text:
Created attachment 147116
patch for updating port

- update 1.08 -> 1.10

	http://cpansearch.perl.org/src/NEILB/Test-Pod-Coverage-1.10/Changes

- add LICENCE 

maintainer lth@FreeBSD.org CC'ed

Tested on FreeBSD-10.0-amd64 (log attached) with:
poudriere testport -j 10-amd64 -o devel/p5-Test-Pod-Coverage > p5-Test-Pod-Coverage.log
